title: Driver
description:
Job Type: Full-Time


Job Summary:

We are seeking a dedicated and professional full-time driver to provide transportation for our CEO, Director, and guests. The ideal candidate will ensure safe, reliable, and comfortable travel, including frequent trips to Johor Bahru. The driver must maintain the highest level of professionalism and confidentiality while offering excellent service.


Key Responsibilities:

· Provide safe, timely, and comfortable transportation for the CEO, Director, and other senior executives.

· Transport guests, ensuring a smooth and pleasant travel experience.

· Drive to various destinations, including regular cross-border trips to Johor Bahru and other key locations.

· Ensure the CEO, Director, and guests are always on time for meetings, events, or appointments.

· Maintain discretion, professionalism, and confidentiality when interacting with the CEO, Director, and guests.

· Plan the best travel routes and avoid delays, keeping the journey efficient and punctual.

· Regularly check the condition of the vehicle and ensure it is well-maintained, clean, and ready for use at all times.

· Manage changes in travel schedules or last-minute requests efficiently and professionally.


Required Qualifications:

· Valid driver’s license with a clean driving record.

· Knowledge of local routes, including frequent routes to Johor Bahru and key business areas.

· Excellent customer service skills, maintaining a courteous and professional demeanour with the CEO, Director, and guests.

· Ability to adapt to flexible working hours

· Experience in driving C-suite executives or high-net-worth individuals.

· Fluency in English, with proficiency in additional languages a plus.

postedCompany.description: Headquartered in Singapore, Agrocorp International is a leading integrated agricultural commodity and food solutions provider with presence in 16 countries and 25 offices. For over 30 years, Agrocorp has played a distinct role in nourishing the changing world with our agri-food supplies and solutions. To better serve our vision of nourishing a changing world, we’ve grown in size and business verticals from farm partnerships to processing plants and to retail market distribution. Our product range has widened to include a wide variety of commodities & food ingredients. In retail space, Sansar foods offers a wide range of premium pulses and HerbYvore is our plant based food range which includes non diary cheese, eggless egg, vegan ice cream etc.
postedCompany.name: AGROCORP INTERNATIONAL PTE LTD
